prospect_name.description: Full name of the prospect on the call

prospect_title.description: Current job title of the prospect

meeting_context.description: How this call was set up — e.g. 'inbound demo request', 'responded to cold email about rep ramp time', 'referral from mutual contact' (optional)

company_research.description: Recent news, funding events, hiring signals, or strategic context about the company (optional)

crm_history.description: Prior interaction history from CRM — past emails, calls, notes, deal stage (optional)

our_product_value_props.description: Key value propositions of our product, used to tailor the pivot-to-value section (optional)
